MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on TUES-NOV-25-2008: Robert D. Resner, counsel by special appearance for plaintiff HSBC Bank USA National Association as trustee for SG Mortgage Securities Trust 2006-OPT2 asset backed certificates, Series 2006-OPT2; Eric L. Lifschitz, counsel by limited scope representation for defendant Cherryl Abdullah, who is also present

Settlement conference held. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is not filed with the Court this day. The DEC-01-2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Norman Nayfach, not reported, Clerk L. Fong (218)
